economic_notes: Band Revenue segment includes campsite operations, property taxation, and resource management. First Nation participates in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP.
notes: Audit is qualified due to absence of budget comparison information as required by PSAS. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants' in Chilliwack, BC. Five subsidiaries consolidated: Chowethel Axwest Managing Partner Ltd., Chowethel Qaqelstexw LLP, Chowethel Projects LP, Chowethel Projects GP Ltd., Q'awelets Holdings Ltd. Social Development and Health Programs combined as one segment — health expenses reported under that combined segment total. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($4,115,140), Province of BC ($589,020), CMHC ($46,423), and Other funding ($863,219) treated as government transfers; BC Gaming Revenue Sharing ($236,383) and other funding classification uncertain. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + Province of BC + CMHC + Other funding + BC Gaming = $5,850,185 plus remaining items; adjusted here to include all non-OSR lines. Internally restricted minor distribution fund of $2,963,518 held as restricted cash.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
